results.title: Payments-related path changed
results.message: File 'pages/api/payment.ts' matches path-classifier rule 'next.payment-api-files' for category 'payments'.
results.recommendation: Payment-related code is high-impact: bugs here can charge or refund the wrong amounts. Review the change against the payment-flow spec, verify with a sandbox transaction, and confirm webhook idempotency where relevant.

results.title: Risky change without paired test: next.payment-api-files
results.message: Changes to pages/api/payment.ts were not paired with a sibling test change in the same diff
results.recommendation: Add or update sibling tests for this change in the same diff. Risky-area changes without paired test changes are difficult to verify and easy to regress. If the change is intentionally test-exempt (e.g., a pure config tweak), document the exemption in the change description.

results.title: Install script added
results.recommendation: Install scripts execute on every consumer machine that runs `npm install` (or equivalent). Verify the script body is intentional and doesn't shell out to untrusted commands, network calls, or filesystem writes.
